message:
Add timeout protection and improve empty value handling

Semantic search (packages/core/src/search/semantic.ts):
- Add 30-second timeout for model loading to prevent hanging on slow networks
- Add warning log when cosine similarity receives mismatched vector dimensions
- Extract timeout logic into reusable timeoutPromise helper function

Template rendering (packages/core/src/template/render.ts):
- Fix getMissingVariables to properly handle empty strings
- Empty string values ("") are now treated as missing, same as undefined
- Empty string defaults are also treated as not providing a value
- This ensures required variables with empty defaults still get validated

Both changes improve robustness in edge cases and provide better
diagnostics when something goes wrong.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
